0.0,330.0,182.0],[30.0,10000.0,16000.0,1700.0,325.0,325.0,184.0],[30.0,11000.0,0.0,1908.0,452.0,452.0,172.0],[30.0,11000.0,2000.0,1887.0,434.0,434.0,174.0],[30.0,11000.0,4000.0,1853.0,415.0,415.0,175.0],[30.0,11000.0,6000.0,1846.0,400.0,400.0,177.0],[30.0,11000.0,8000.0,1827.0,384.0,384.0,178.0],[30.0,11000.0,10000.0,1849.0,373.0,373.0,181.0],[30.0,12000.0,0.0,2021.0,467.0,467.0,173.0],[30.0,12000.0,2000.0,2020.0,453.0,453.0,175.0],[30.0,12000.0,4000.0,2002.0,436.0,436.0,177.0],[30.0,12000.0,6000.0,2014.0,424.0,424.0,179.0],[30.0,13000.0,0.0,2273.0,501.0,501.0,180.0],[30.0,13000.0,2000.0,2267.0,487.0,487.0,182.0],[37.0,10000.0,0.0,1790.0,438.0,438.0,172.0],[37.0,10000.0,2000.0,1737.0,416.0,416.0,172.0],[37.0,10000.0,4000.0,1741.0,402.0,402.0,175.0],[37.0,10000.0,6000.0,1694.0,381.0,381.0,175.0],[37.0,10000.0,8000.0,1669.0,364.0,364.0,176.0],[37.0,10000.0,10000.0,1667.0,350.0,350.0,178.0],[37.0,10000.0,12000.0,1693.0,342.0,342.0,181.0],[37.0,11000.0,0.0,1891.0,451.0,451.0,172.0],[37.0,11000.0,2000.0,1864.0,433.0,433.0,174.0],[37.0,11000.0,4000.0,1852.0,417.0,417.0,175.0],[37.0,11000.0,6000.0,1849.0,403.0,403.0,177.0],[37.0,11000.0,8000.0,1879.0,393.0,393.0,181.0],[37.0,12000.0,0.0,2114.0,482.0,482.0,178.0],[37.0,12000.0,2000.0,2101.0,466.0,466.0,180.0],[0.0,13000.0,14000.0,1304.0,256.0,536.0,214.0],[10.0,12000.0,18000.0,1199.0,239.0,578.0,218.0],[10.0,13000.0,6000.0,1458.0,338.0,776.0,212.0],[37.0,13000.0,18000.0,1376.0,267.0,537.0,234.0]]};
  window.__etoldTriLookupExact = function(chartKey, isa, wt, alt) {
    const ch = ETOLD_DATA[chartKey];
    if (!ch || ch.type !== 'cr') return null;
    if (isa == null || wt == null || alt == null) return null;
    const iArr = ch.i.slice().sort((a,b)=>a-b);
    const wArr = ch.w.slice().sort((a,b)=>a-b);
    const aArr = ch.a.slice().sort((a,b)=>a-b);
    const iMin = iArr[0], iMax = iArr[iArr.length-1];
    const wMin = wArr[0], wMax = wArr[wArr.length-1];
    const aMin = aArr[0], aMax = aArr[aArr.length-1];
    const epsI = 1e-6 * Math.max(1, Math.abs(iMax - iMin));
    const epsW = 1e-6 * Math.max(1, Math.abs(wMax - wMin));
    const epsA = 1e-6 * Math.max(1, Math.abs(aMax - aMin));
    if (isa < iMin - epsI || isa > iMax + epsI || wt < wMin - epsW || wt > wMax + epsW || alt < aMin - epsA || alt > aMax + epsA) return 'Out of Range';
    function loHi(arr, v, exactStick) {
      const vv = Math.max(arr[0], Math.min(arr[arr.length-1], v));
      let lo = arr[0];
      for (const x of arr) if (x <= vv) lo = x;
      let hi = lo;
      if (!(exactStick && vv === lo)) {
        const idx = arr.indexOf(lo);
        hi = arr[Math.min(idx + 1, arr.length - 1)];
      }
      const t = (hi !== lo) ? (vv - lo) / (hi - lo) : 0;
      return [lo, hi, t];
    }
    const isSE = chartKey === "31_1_13_se_maximum_range_power";
    const [i0, i1, ti] = loHi(iArr, isa, false);
    const [w0, w1, tw] = loHi(wArr, wt, false);
    const [a0, a1, ta] = loHi(aArr, alt, isSE);
    if (!ch._idx) {
      const idx = new Map();
      for (const r of ch.d) idx.set(`${r[0]}|${r[1]}|${r[2]}`, r);
      ch._idx = idx;
    }
    const rawRowAt = (ii, ww, aa) => ch._idx.get(`${ii}|${ww}|${aa}`);
    const rowAt = (ii, ww, aa) => {
      let r = rawRowAt(ii, ww, aa);
      if (!r && isSE && ii === i1 && i1 !== i0) r = rawRowAt(i0, ww, aa);
      return r;
    };
    function interpCol(col) {
      const c000=rowAt(i0,w0,a0), c001=rowAt(i0,w0,a1),
            c010=rowAt(i0,w1,a0), c011=rowAt(i0,w1,a1),
            c100=rowAt(i1,w0,a0), c101=rowAt(i1,w0,a1),
            c110=rowAt(i1,w1,a0), c111=rowAt(i1,w1,a1);
      if (!c000||!c001||!c010||!c011||!c100||!c101||!c110||!c111) return null;
      const v000=c000[col], v001=c001[col], v010=c010[col], v011=c011[col],
            v100=c100[col], v101=c101[col], v110=c110[col], v111=c111[col];
      const v00 = v000 + ta*(v001 - v000);
      const v01 = v010 + ta*(v011 - v010);
      const v10 = v100 + ta*(v101 - v100);
      const v11 = v110 + ta*(v111 - v110);
      const v0  = v00  + tw*(v01 - v00);
      const v1  = v10  + tw*(v11 - v10);
      return v0 + ti*(v1 - v0);
    }
    return { torque:interpCol(3), ff_eng:interpCol(4), ff_total:interpCol(5), tas:interpCol(6) };
  };
})();
